compiled_state.title: sprint: skill unavailable -> infinite retry loop instead of graceful failure
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When the dso:sprint skill file is unavailable or cannot be loaded, the sprint command enters an infinite retry loop instead of failing gracefully with an error message. Expected behavior: the command should detect that the skill is unavailable and exit with a clear error. Actual behavior: the command retries indefinitely, consuming resources.

comments.body: Gate 1a: agent dispatch failed (plugin agent type limitation) — treating as ambiguous. Gate 1b: no feature-request language detected (triggered=false). Proceeding to investigation (intent-aligned via fallback path).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral — ticket describes sprint orchestrator behavioral failure AND fix requires editing plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Behavioral assertion (LLM-behavioral exemption): When sprint skill file fails to load, sprint MUST exit with clear error message. Current behavior: enters infinite retry loop. Expected: detect skill unavailability, emit error, terminate gracefully.
comments.author: Test
